title: Claim v1
description: Schema for a published research claim within the Tribunus Inference Research Evidence Plane. Binds experimental evidence to a specific factual assertion with scope, limitations, and confidence.

wording.description: Canonical, precise statement of the claim.

scope.description: Scope of applicability (e.g. model families, hardware platforms, quantization levels).

machine_profile.description: Machine profile identifier this claim applies to.

model_id.description: Model identifier this claim applies to.

workload_ids.description: Workload identifiers this claim is based on.

baseline_experiment.description: Experiment identifier for the baseline comparison.

treatment_experiment.description: Experiment identifier for the treatment comparison.

comparison_ids.description: Identifiers of comparisons used to support this claim.

analysis_artifact_hashes.description: Hashes of analysis artifacts that support this claim.

limitations.description: Known limitations and caveats of this claim.

confidence_statement.description: Qualitative or quantitative statement of confidence in the claim.
